category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Palau.

title.en: China-to-Palau EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入巴劳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入巴勞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Palau MPIC / MPIC / PPUC requirements, 120/240 V 60 Hz grid adaptation, SAE J1772 and CCS1 connector expectations, UL-direction EVSE safety, FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与巴劳MPIC / MPIC / PPUC要求、120/240 V 60 Hz电网适配、SAE J1772和CCS1接口预期、UL方向EVSE安全、FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000电磁兼容证据、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與巴勞MPIC / MPIC / PPUC要求、120/240 V 60 Hz電網適配、SAE J1772和CCS1接口預期、UL方向EVSE安全、FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000電磁相容證據、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering the Palau, the fundamental gaps are 120/240 V 60 Hz electrical revalidation against China's 220/380 V 50 Hz domestic baseline, hardware conversion from GB/T 20234 to SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC, UL-direction EVSE safety evidence such as UL 2594 or UL 2202, FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence for electronic and networked equipment, PPUC site connection approval, and hurricane-prone island installation resilience. A Palau-specific mandatory EVSE certification route could not be confirmed from the provided sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current MPIC, MPIC, PPUC, customs, and project requirements before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入巴劳时，根本差距包括：相对中国220/380 V 50 Hz国内基线，须按120/240 V 60 Hz重新验证电气设计；接口须从GB/T 20234硬件转换为交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1；须准备UL方向EVSE安全证据，如UL 2594或UL 2202；电子及联网设备须准备FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000电磁兼容证据；并取得PPUC现场接入批准，同时考虑飓风多发海岛环境的安装韧性。截至2026年6月14日，未能从所给来源确认巴劳专门针对EVSE的强制认证路径；出口商应在发货前核实现行MPIC、MPIC、PPUC、海关及项目要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入巴勞時，根本差距包括：相對中國220/380 V 50 Hz國內基線，須按120/240 V 60 Hz重新驗證電氣設計；接口須從GB/T 20234硬體轉換為交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1；須準備UL方向EVSE安全證據，如UL 2594或UL 2202；電子及聯網設備須準備FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000電磁相容證據；並取得PPUC現場接入批准，同時考慮颶風多發海島環境的安裝韌性。截至2026年6月14日，未能從所給來源確認巴勞專門針對EVSE的強制認證路徑；出口商應在發貨前核實現行MPIC、MPIC、PPUC、海關及項目要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MPIC scope determination, MPIC approval, PPUC interconnection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, hurricane-resilience design, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Palau conformity, utility, electrical-code, telecom, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MPIC适用范围裁定、MPIC批准、PPUC并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定、抗飓风设计或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行巴劳合格评定、电力、电气规范、通信、海关及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MPIC適用範圍裁定、MPIC批准、PPUC併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、抗颶風設計或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴勞合格評定、電力、電氣規範、通訊、海關及項目要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
